PLAN_NAME 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Benefit Package Name 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the plan benefit package (PBP) for the Part D plan sponsor's contract. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PLAN_NAME 
TYPE: 
CHAR

75

CMS (HPMS Files)

text description
